title: Shri Satyanarayan Bhagwan Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Satyanarayan Bhagwan Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Lord Satyanarayan.
description:
Jai Lakshmi Ramana,
Swami Jai Lakshmi Ramana.
Satyanarayan Swami,
Jan paatak harana॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Ramana ॥

Ratna jadit sinhasan,
Adbhut chhavi rajai.
Narad karat nirajan,
Ghanta dhwani bajai॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Ramana ॥

Prakat bhaye kali karan,
Dwij ko darsh diyo.
Budha brahman bankar,
Kanchan mahal kiyo॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Ramana ॥

Durbal bhil katharo,
Jin par kripa kari.
Chandrachood ek raja,
Tinki vipatti hari॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Ramana ॥

Vaishya manorath payo,
Shraddha taj deenhi.
So phal bhogyo prabhuji,
Phir-stuti keenhin॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Ramana ॥

Bhav bhakti ke karan,
Chhin-chhin roop dharyo.
Shraddha dharan keenhin,
Tinko kaaj saryo॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Ramana ॥

Gwal-bal sang raja,
Van mein bhakti kari.
Manvanchit phal deenho,
Deendayal hari॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Ramana ॥

Chadhat prasad savayo,
Kadli phal, meva.
Dhoop deep tulsi se,
Raji Satyadeva॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Ramana ॥

Shri Satyanarayan ji ki aarti,
Jo koi nar gaavai.
Riddhi-siddh sukh-sampatti,
Sahaj roop paave॥
॥ Om Jai Lakshmi Ramana ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Satyanarayan Bhagwan's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed to surrender oneself to the 'Truth' (God) and to seek the fulfillment of one's wishes.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for his Puja and Aarti?
faq.a2: Full moon days (Purnima), Ekadashi, and the beginning of any auspicious work are the best times.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Lord Satyanarayan during Aarti?
faq.a3: Panjiri (made of wheat flour, ghee, and sugar), Panchamrit, bananas, and Tulsi leaves are mandatory.
faq.q4: Can Satyanarayan Bhagwan's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, performing the Satyanarayan Katha and Aarti is one of the most popular rituals in Indian homes.
faq.q5: What is considered best to do after the Aarti?
faq.a5: It is considered essential to listen to the 'Satyanarayan Katha' and distribute the Prasad to everyone after the Aarti.
